start: Welcome! 👋 This is Qulay Navbat — online appointment booking for businesses in Namangan region. What would you like to do?
choose_language: Tilni tanlang / Выберите язык / Choose language:
no_location: This business hasn't set a location yet.
choose_business_category: What type of service do you need?
choose_staff: Choose a staff member (or any available):
no_slots: Sorry, no available slots for this day. Please choose another date.
invalid_phone: Invalid phone number. Please send it like +998901234567 or 901234567:
booking_failed: ❌ Booking failed. The slot may have been taken. Please try again.
slot_taken: ❌ That time was just taken. Please pick another slot.
cancel_failed: Could not cancel the booking. Please try again.
review_failed: Could not submit the review. Please try again.
join_invalid: ❌ Invite link not found or expired.
server_error: ⚠️ Server error. Please try again in a moment.
no_categories: No categories available yet. Please check back later.
no_businesses_found: No businesses found in this category yet.
web_login_confirm: 🔐 Confirm login to the web dashboard? If this wasn't you, ignore this message.
web_login_done: ✅ Done! Return to your browser — you're logged in.
web_login_failed: ❌ Login failed. Please try again from the browser.
setloc_prompt:
📍 Share your business location.

Standing in your shop, tap the “📍 Send location” button below, or pick it on the map via 📎 → Location.
setloc_success: ✅ Thanks! Location received. Go back to the app (browser) and continue.
setloc_failed: ⚠️ Couldn't save the location. Please try again from the app.
setloc_invalid: ⚠️ This link expired. Tap “Set location via Telegram” in the app again.
